## Description

Brief description of what this PR changes or adds.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New command documented
- [ ] New workflow example
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Other

## Testing

Describe how you tested this change. Include commands run and results:

- [ ] Tested with local Obsidian vault (CLI enabled, app running)
- [ ] Sandbox bypass (`dangerouslyDisableSandbox: true`) works correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] My code/docs follow the existing style and structure
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/effectiveness
- [ ] I have kept commits small and focused (one purpose per commit)
